title: A Generalist Agent
hook: Imagine one AI that can chat, play video games, and control robots all at once.
promise: You will understand how Gato reframes many tasks as a single, generalist sequence problem.
prerequisite_note: Bring a sense of how language models process sequences, and curiosity about agents that act in the world.

glossary.plain: Treating data as a series of tokens, predicting the next one each time.
Able to handle many kinds of input and output, like text, images, and actions.
A single model that performs many different tasks across domains.
Breaking data into small pieces, like words or actions, for the model to process.
A rule or function that chooses what the agent should do next.
A model that predicts the next item in a sequence based on previous ones.

cards.title: One Model, Many Talents
body: Discover how Gato learns to solve dozens of tasks by seeing everything as a sequence.

cards.title: Can one brain do it all?
body: Imagine an AI that can chat, stack blocks with a robot arm, and play Atari games, all using the same brain.
For years, AI agents were specialists, each trained for one job. What if we could train a single agent to do almost anything?

cards.title: How Gato Sees Every Task
body: First, Gato takes in inputs like images, text, or sensor data, and turns them into tokens.
Next, it processes these tokens with a transformer, just like a language model predicts words.
Finally, Gato outputs tokens, which can be words, button presses, or robot movements.
By using the same process for all tasks, Gato learns to act, talk, and understand in one model.
cards.caption: Gato unifies vision, language, and control as one big sequence problem.

cards.title: One Model or Many?
body: Toggle to see the difference between using separate specialist agents and Gato's unified approach.
cards.offNote: Each task needs its own model, which takes lots of training and maintenance.
cards.onNote: A single model handles dozens of tasks, switching between them by changing its input tokens.

cards.title: The Sequence Trick
body: Gato's breakthrough is to treat every task as a sequence problem, whether it's language, control, or vision.
This means it can use the same transformer architecture for everything, just by changing how inputs and outputs are tokenized.

cards.title: Specialization vs. Generalization
body: Slide to explore what happens as you move from specialist to generalist agents.
cards.low: Best performance on one task, but can't handle new or mixed tasks.
cards.mid: Handles several related tasks, but may not excel at any single one.
cards.high: Takes on many tasks at once, with some loss in top performance for each.

cards.title: Pick Gato's Ingredients
body: Which components are essential for building a generalist agent like Gato?

choices.label: Multimodal tokenization
choices.note: Turns images, text, and actions into a common format.

choices.label: Unified policy output
choices.note: Lets the model act, talk, or write.

choices.label: Task conditioning
choices.note: Tells the model which task to perform.

choices.label: Autoregressive prediction
choices.note: Predicts the next token, no matter the task.

cards.title: Gato's Many Skills
body: Gato performed over 600 tasks, from stacking blocks to captioning images, all with one set of weights.
While it does not always match the best specialist models, Gato shows strong performance across a wide range of challenges.
cards.caption: Gato set a new bar for multitask agents, even if it did not beat every specialist.

cards.title: A New Path for AI Agents
body: Gato's approach inspired a new wave of research into generalist AI, unifying tasks once thought separate.
It showed that with the right framing, one model can learn to see, talk, and act, just by reading sequences.

cards.title: How Gato Works in Four Moves

recap.label: Tokenize
recap.note: Convert all data into tokens, no matter the type.

recap.label: Sequence
recap.note: Feed the token stream through a transformer.

recap.label: Condition
recap.note: Tell the model what task to perform with special tokens.

recap.label: Act
recap.note: Generate outputs as new tokens for any task.

cards.title: A Generalist Agent
body: Read the full paper for technical details and more experiments.
